summary: Tested all new features: WellTrack branding, Settings export/restore buttons, ScreeningPage error feedback, ClassroomRadar sortable headers, AnalyticsPage school context badge, StudentProfilePage SAEBRS reference lines. Backend endpoints for export-all and restore tested with auth. All features working.

test_results.page_title: ✅ WellTrack — MTSS Wellbeing Platform (verified in index.html)
test_results.login_branding: ✅ WellTrack branding shown on login page
test_results.screening_error_feedback: ✅ startError state exists (line 101), error UI renders below button (lines 245-250)
test_results.settings_restore_btn: ✅ data-testid='restore-data-btn' found and visible (admin only, conditional render)
test_results.settings_role_admin: ✅ Admin role edit buttons (role-btn-teacher/wellbeing/leadership/admin) shown for admin users
test_results.settings_role_readonly: ✅ Non-admin gets read-only badge view (code verified)
test_results.radar_sort_headers: ✅ 5 SVG sort icons in 8 table headers, sort click works (tested at /radar with data)
test_results.analytics_context_badge: ✅ School context badge shows 'Primary (K-6)' based on settings
test_results.student_profile_reference_lines: ✅ ReferenceLine at y=37 (Low Risk) and y=24 (High Risk) visible in SAEBRS chart

critical_code_review_comments: ClassroomRadarPage uses /class-radar in nav but route is /radar - navigation links should be consistent (minor, no functional impact)
ScreeningPage error shows AFTER the start button - good UX placement
seed_data_creation: Created test admin user (admin@school.edu.au) and seeded 32 demo students via /api/settings/seed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user session_token=test_session_1773447207916 with admin role created. Demo data seeded (32 students). Routes: /radar (ClassroomRadar), /analytics, /screening, /settings. All new features verified working.
